resolver for the .agent namespace. Inherits         AttributeStorage and owns its own typed-attribute state.         Decoupled from any other store. Subject id for a name node is the node itself (already a bytes32 namehash). ENSIP-9 multi-coin address records stay on-contract because they don't fit the attribute-store model cleanly. The `text(node, key)` ABI is preserved as a compat shim \u2014 keys hash to predicate ids and unregistered keys soft-fail to \"\" (mirrors ENS no-record-set
